title: Archive entry (archived / avatarless agent)
description: Target contract for agents deliberately archived out of the persona/reference layer (currently archive/avatarless-agents/). DEFINITION ONLY — not enforced in PR B. Archive entries MUST NOT require an active .agents/agents/<id> directory.

original_path.description: Where the agent lived before archiving, e.g. .agents/agents/<id>/ and/or Avatar/agents/System_Prompt_Agent_<id>.md.

archived_reason.description: Why archived, e.g. 'no matching avatar image'.

restore_criteria.description: What must be true to restore to the active layer, e.g. 'an avatar image is added' (cf. hassan-dahir, restored when avatar landed in PR #13).

validation_behavior.description: Archived entries should not be flagged as missing active agents. validate-harness currently emits FALSE POSITIVES for archived_avatarless_agents — that fix is LATER validation-hygiene, NOT PR B.

$comment: 10 agents are deliberately archived under archive/avatarless-agents/ (reason: no matching avatar image). hassan-dahir is NOT archived (avatar added in PR #13). validate-harness false positives for archived_avatarless_agents are tracked as later validation-hygiene.
